title: tylophora iringensis
intro: Tylophora iringensis is a plant species in the family Asclepiadaceae, commonly known as a type of milkweed vine. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Tylophora iringensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
